case_title: NANCY YEE VS. ALLSTATE INSURANCE COMPANY

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY YEE, NANCY AS TO DEFENDANT ALLSTATE INSURANCE COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-28-2008 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY PLAINTIFF YEE, NANCY
RETURN OF CONTINUANCE ORDER - SENT TO ALLSTATE INSURANCE COMPANY

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-29-2008 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION TO OCT-06-2008 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. THE COURT RETURNS THIS CASE TO ITS CALENDAR FOR FURTHER TESTIMONY FROM PLAINTIFF CONCERNING HER CLAIM. PLAINTIFF SHOULD BE PREPARED TO PROVIDE INFORMATION CONCERNING THE PERIOD OF TIME WHEN LIVING EXPENSES WERE REQUIRED, AND THE SPECIFIC PROVISIONS OF THE INSURANCE POLICY THAT APPLY TO HER CLAIM. COMMISSIONETR PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
TRIAL RESET TO AUG-06-2008 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF JUL-28-2008 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-06-2008 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO AUG-29-2008 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF YEE, NANCY AS TO DEFENDANT ALLSTATE INSURANCE COMPANY
SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF DISMISSAL RETURNED UNCLAIMED. SENT TO ALLSTATE INSURANCE COMPANY.
CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNCLAIMED. SENT TO DEFT.

DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF DID NOT PROVIDE SUFFICIENT EVIDENCE TO ESTABLISH COMPLIANCE WITH THE TERMS OF THE SUBJECT POLICY, THE SPECIFIC FACTUAL BASIS FOR HER CLAIM LOSS, OR THE PROVISIONS OF THE SUBJECT INSURANCE POLICY THAT APPLY TO HER CLAIMED LOSSES. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF YEE, NANCY AS TO DEFENDANT ALLSTATE INSURANCE COMPANY
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUN-23-2008, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ALLSTATE INSURANCE COMPANY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-29-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-29-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT ALLSTATE INSURANCE COMPANY NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
RETURN OF CONTINUANCE ORDER - SENT TO ALL STATE INSURANCE COMPANY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-06-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-06-2008 BY PRO TEM COMMISSIONER: MARK SCHREIBER, CLERK: MARJORIE SCHWARTZ-SCOTT, NOT REPORTED (506) APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. EXHIBITS RETAINED BY PLAINTIFF.
